digest.en: US envoys, including Jason Greenblatt and Jared Kushner, are traveling to Pakistan for talks on Iran. A major Russian attack on Ukraine has resulted in seven deaths. Bangladesh has issued a nationwide security alert due to possible militant attacks.
digest.hi: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति चुनाव में डोनाल्ड ट्रंप के हमलों पर भारत की प्रतिक्रिया संतुलित रही है। भारत ने न तो खुलकर समर्थन किया है और न ही आलोचना की है। इस बीच, अमेरिकी चुनावों में ट्रंप की संभावनाओं पर चिंता जताई जा रही है।

articles.title: Witkoff and Kushner to Travel to Pakistan for Talks on Iran
articles.summary: Witkoff and Kushner will travel to Pakistan for talks on Iran. Witkoff and Kushner to Travel to Pakistan for Talks on Iran.

articles.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
articles.summary: Seven people died in a Russian attack on Ukraine. Dnipro was hardest hit. Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine.

articles.title: US envoys head to Pakistan for Iran war talks
articles.summary: US envoys are heading to Pakistan for Iran war talks. The US is "looking for a face-saving way to escape the war quagmire it has become trapped in", says Iran's defence ministry.

articles.title: 850 Of Elon Musk's Recent X Posts On Discrimination Against White People
articles.summary: Elon Musk posted 850 times on X about discrimination against white people. Musk's focus on race has also drawn criticism from some of his former supporters. 850 Of Elon Musk's Recent X Posts On Discrimination Against White People.

articles.title: Bangladesh issues nationwide security alert over possible militant attacks
articles.summary: Bangladesh issued a nationwide security alert due to possible militant attacks. "The alert has been issued based on intelligence reports,” a police headquarters (PHQ) official said, requesting anonymity. The official described the alert as “urgent and confidential”.

articles.title: No Degree? No Platform. China Fines Fake Finance Gurus $14,000 And Deletes Their Accounts
articles.summary: China fined fake finance gurus $14,000 and deleted their social media accounts after new influencer rules took effect, triggering severe consequences across the digital economy. China changed influencer rules, triggering severe consequences across digital economy.

articles.title: The 85-Year-Old Widow Snagged by Trump’s Immigration Crackdown
articles.summary: Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, an 85-year-old French widow of a former G. I., was deported from the US under Trump's immigration crackdown. In her first interview since being deported, she recounted her experience in ICE detention.

articles.title: Gunmen stage simultaneous attacks across Mali, army says
articles.summary: Gunmen staged simultaneous attacks across Mali, targeting the capital Bamako and several other locations in an apparently coordinated assault involving multiple groups. Capital Bamako and several other locations hit in an apparently coordinated ⁠assault involving multiple groups.

articles.title: 2nd Round Of Talks In Pakistan Today, Commercial Flights Resume In Tehran
articles.summary: Commercial flights resumed in Tehran as US-Iran tensions eased, coinciding with a second round of talks between the two nations. US-Iran War News Live Update:. 2nd Round Of Talks In Pakistan Today, Commercial Flights Resume In Tehran.

articles.title: Europe Prepares for a Longer War in Ukraine, With No Strategy to End It
articles.summary: Europe prepares for a longer war in Ukraine with no clear path to victory or peace. With American dealmakers wrapped up with Iran, neither Russia nor Ukraine has a clear path to victory.

articles.title: US, Iran To Hold 2nd Round Of Talks In Pakistan Today. What's On Agenda?
articles.summary: Iran and the US will hold a second round of peace talks in Pakistan. The previous round occurred on April 11-12, amid a delicate ceasefire. The previous round of talks was held on April 11-12.

articles.title: ‘Astonishing’ discovery could help save children from deadly disfiguring condition
articles.summary: Researchers found a new bacteria species in noma patients that could lead to better treatments.

articles.title: Top Iranian and Pakistani officials meet in Islamabad
articles.summary: Iran's FM Abbas Araghchi met Pakistani officials in Islamabad for talks. Iran’s FM Abbas Araghchi is in Islamabad for talks with Pakistani officials, as US envoys are also set to arrive.

articles.title: Palestinians in West Bank and some in Gaza vote in local elections
articles.summary: Palestinians in the West Bank and one Gazan city voted in local elections, with Hamas and other groups boycotting the process. Local elections are held in the occupied West Bank and in one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not taking part.

articles.title: Iran executes man over 'mission' for Israel's spy agency
articles.summary: Iran executed Erfan Kiani for allegedly working with Israel's spy agency. Erfan Kiani was hanged after his sentence was upheld by the country's Supreme Court, the judiciary's Mizan Online website said.

articles.title: Iran Foreign Minister Araghchi meets Pakistan Army chief Munir
articles.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi met with Pakistan's Army chief Munir, coinciding with the resumption of commercial flights from Tehran's international airport after a two-month hiatus. Iran resumes commercial flights from Tehran’s international airport for the first time since the conflict with the U. S.

articles.title: Overnight Russian attacks on Ukraine kill five, injure 30
articles.summary: Russia launched over 600 drones and 47 missiles at Ukraine, killing five and injuring 30 in eight regions. Russia launched more than 600 drones and 47 missiles as it targeted eight regions in Dnipro, authorities say.

articles.title: Iran resumes commercial flights from Tehran’s international airport for first time since conflict
articles.summary: Iran resumed commercial flights from Tehran's international airport after a two-month halt due to conflict. Iran has resumed commercial flights from Tehran’s international airport for the first time since the conflict with the U. S.

articles.title: On Iran’s Border, Cooking Oil Trade Is a Snapshot of the Country’s Struggles
articles.summary: Iran's economic crisis has forced many to cross into Turkey to buy basic goods like cooking oil. The war has exacerbated Iran’s economic crisis, forcing many to cross the border into Turkey to buy the most basic goods.

articles.title: Ireland to demand Israel pay for settler demolition of Palestinian school
articles.summary: Ireland will demand Israel repay the cost of a demolished Palestinian school. Ireland will demand that Israeli authorities repay the cost of a school that was demolished by settlers. Ireland to demand Israel pay for settler demolition of Palestinian school.

articles.title: Iran executes atomic agency worker over ‘spying’ charge, hangs protester as crackdown intensifies
articles.summary: Iran has executed an atomic agency worker accused of spying and hanged a protester amid a widening crackdown. The executions come as tensions between Iran and the West escalate. Iran executes atomic agency worker over ‘spying’ charge, hangs protester as crackdown intensifies.

articles.title: ट्रंप के बार-बार हमलों पर भारत की नपी-तुली, संतुलित प्रतिक्रिया की वजह क्या है?
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ने भारत को 'धरती पर नरक' कहा, जिस पर कांग्रेस ने मोदी सरकार की प्रतिक्रिया को 'बेहद कमज़ोर' बताया। विपक्षी पार्टी ने सरकार की चुप्प पर सवाल उठाए। सरकार की ओर से अभी तक कोई आधिकारिक बयान नहीं आया है।

hi.title: ट्रंप के बार-बार हमलों पर भारत की नपी-तुली, संतुलित प्रतिक्रिया की वजह क्या है?

articles.title: US-इस्राइल के हमले में कितना हुआ शरीर को नुकसान; CIA-मोसाद ढूंढने में क्यों नाकाम?
articles.summary: अमेरिका और इस्राइल ने 28 फरवरी को ईरान पर हमला किया। ईरान के सुप्रीम लीडर अयातुल्ला अली खामेनेई सहित कई सैन्य अफसर मारे गए। 28 फरवरी को अमेरिका और इस्राइल की तरफ से ईरान पर हमला बोला गया था।

articles.title: इटली की पीएम जॉर्जिया मेलोनी ने पहने भारतीय झुमके, इस्टा पर शेयर की सेल्फी; अबतक आए 4.23 लाख लाइक्स
articles.summary: इटली की प्रधानमंत्री जॉर्जिया मेलोनी ने इंस्टाग्राम पर एक सेल्फी शेयर की, जिसमें उन्होंने भारतीय झुमके पहने हुए थे। इस पोस्ट को 4.23 लाख से अधिक लाइक्स मिले हैं। मेलोनी की इस पोस्ट ने सोशल मीडिया पर ध्यान आकर्षित किया है।

articles.summary: मिस साके इंडिया 2026 प्रतियोगिता ने भारत-जापान सांस्कृतिक कूटनीति को मजबूत करने में मदद की। यह प्रतियोगिता दोनों देशों के बीच सांस्कृतिक संबंधों को बढ़ावा देने के लिए आयोजित की गई थी।

articles.title: आईटी पेशेवरों को लग सकता है बड़ा झटका: तीन साल के लिए H-1B वीजा पर रोक की तैयारी, प्रस्ताव पेश

articles.title: पंजाबः 300 फ़ुट ऊंचे टावर पर 18 महीने तक बिताने वाले गुरजीत सिंह को कैसे उतारा गया
articles.summary: पंजाब में 300 फ़ुट ऊंचे टावर पर 18 महीने से बैठे गुरजीत सिंह को शुक्रवार सुबह 7.45 बजे टावर से नीचे उतारा गया। वह 12 अक्तूबर, 2024 से टावर पर बैठे थे।
